category_sources: source_facts.description says Ogg Vorbis CODEC tools; official Xiph Vorbis resources identify Vorbis as an audio codec and vorbis-tools as reference tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vorbis-tools; official Xiph GitLab project is named Vorbis tools.
docs_sources: Official Xiph Vorbis page and Xiph wiki provide Vorbis documentation; official GitLab project is the best project-specific source surface found.
repo_sources: Official Xiph GitLab lists Xiph.Org / Vorbis tools; source_facts.repo is empty, so the official source-control project URL was determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Ogg Vorbis command-line tools; official Xiph resources identify Vorbis audio codec tooling.
